content: Always use [[wikilinks]] for internal vault references. Never use [text](path) markdown links. Link to entities (NPCs, factions, locations) whenever mentioned.
Callout types: [!info] player-facing lore, [!warning]- GM Only (collapsed), [!tip] GM craft, [!quote] in-world text, [!example] stat blocks, [!note]- collapsible. Add - for collapsed default.
Every file needs YAML frontmatter with at minimum: tags array and type field. Use tag hierarchy: #npc, #faction, #location, #region/[name], #status/active.
